name: vigil-scopos
description: AI infrastructure security scanner with cryptographic audit trails

scripts.start: npm run build && node dist/bin/scopos.js scan
scripts.scan: npm run build && node dist/bin/scopos.js scan
scripts.audit: npm run build && node dist/bin/scopos.js audit
scripts.release:check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run pack:check && node dist/bin/scopos.js --help
